enigmasoft. enigmasoft is a Industrial Machinery Manufacturing company. Enigmasoft supports innovative and future-oriented companies with precision and efficient technologies in the field of inline quality control. Founded in 2019. Headquartered in Austria.
[...]
enigmasoft GmbH is a enigmasoft GmbH is a technology expert that develops, produces and markets sustainable system solutions for the digitalised quality assurance of the future. Our focus is on software, automated systems, machines and equipment for 100% inline inspection of parts in the production cycle. 

iQ (integrated Quality)
[...]
Customers use the systems in our iQ product family to integrate the best quality into their production process.
[...]
Our inspection technology allows subsequent integration of new part series or also temporary conversions for pre-series (e.g., transition phase from conventional to alternative drive systems) in an easy and cost-effective manner.
[...]
Enigmasoft brings together specialists from the fields of automation technology, industrial image processing, industrial design, mechanical engineering, mechatronics and software technology with over 20 years of professional experience in their respective areas.
[...]

companies.name: Vimotech Automatisierung GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Vimotech Automatisierung GmbH. # Vimotech Automatisierung GmbH

Vimotech Automatisierung GmbH is a Industrial Machinery Manufacturing company. The company specializes in automation technology for innovative solutions for industrial processes. They offer comprehensive solutions for automation, software development, and predictive maintenance. Their goal is to improve product quality and customer satisfaction. Founded in 2022. Headquartered in Holzhausen, Upper Austria, Austria.

## About
Vimotech bietet innovative und zuverlässige Lösungen für automatisierungstechnische Anforderungen. Dies umfasst unter anderem die Automatisierung mittels SPS, Windows Applikationen und den Einsatz von Machine Vision / Learning Systemen. Die entsprechenden Anforderungen werden gemeinsam mit meinen Kunden ausgearbeitet um eine bestmögliche Lösung zu erhalten.

companies.name: Robooptic GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Robooptic GmbH. # Robooptic GmbH

Robooptic GmbH is a Machinery Manufacturing company. Founded in 1998. Headquartered in Klagenfurt, Carinthia, Austria.

## About
- Robooptic is assembly specialist for machine vision, micro-positioning, active alignment and precision bonding for opto-electronics components 

- developing alignment processes together with the R&D teams of the customers 

- industrialization and manufacturing of production lines, supporting the customers in the ramp up phase to achieve performance, Cpk, Cgk, OEE 

- typical products: digital car head and rear lamps (LED, laser, OLED, etc.), RGB projectors, near eye projectors, ADAS & LiDAR systems, etc.
